 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.12.6","title":"i18n Demo: click toggles + RTL interactions + shortcut scenarios","description":"Background
- i18n edge cases are easiest to see when users can toggle direction/locale live.

Goal
- Add mouse toggles and shortcuts to cycle i18n scenarios quickly.

Mouse Interactions
- Click locale/direction toggles.
- Wheel scrolls sample list.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `D`: toggle RTL.
- `L`: cycle locale.
- `R`: reset.

Acceptance Criteria
- Toggling is deterministic and snapshot-friendly.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/i18n_demo.rs`","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:51:08.614203318Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T01:51:08.614203318Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","i18n","mouse","shortcuts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.12.6","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.12","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:51:08.614203318Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.12.6","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:51:08.614203318Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.12.6","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:51:08.614203318Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.12.6","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:51:08.614203318Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.13","title":"Mouse/Shortcuts Pass: Systems screens","description":"Purpose
- Track mouse-first + shortcut-rich upgrades for Systems-category screens.

Included Screens
- Terminal Capabilities
- Performance
- Action Timeline
- Virtualized Search
- Async Tasks
- Performance HUD (degradation challenge)
- Explainability Cockpit
- VOI Overlay
- Accessibility Panel
- Determinism Lab

Systems Themes
- These screens should feel like control panels.
- Mouse clicks toggle options and select items; wheel scrolls logs/tables.
- Shortcuts provide rapid toggles for overlays, filters, and scenario playback.
- Must remain deterministic and instrumentation-friendly.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:55.822054843Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:55.822054843Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","mouse","shortcuts","systems"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:47:55.822054843Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.1","title":"Terminal Capabilities: click profiles/toggles + scroll + shortcuts","description":"Background
- TerminalCapabilities is a systems control panel for capability profiles and fallback behavior.

Goal
- Make it mouse-first: click profiles, click toggles, scroll logs/details; and add shortcuts for rapid switching.

Mouse Interactions
- Click a capability/profile row selects it.
- Click toggles enable/disable simulation flags.
- Wheel scrolls the detail/log pane.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `1-5`: pick a common profile.
- `T`: toggle a focused capability.
- `R`: reset.

Acceptance Criteria
- Changes are deterministic and reflected immediately.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/terminal_capabilities.rs`","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.355210233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.355210233Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["capabilities","demo-showcase","mouse","shortcuts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.355210233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.355210233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.355210233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.1","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.355210233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.10","title":"Determinism Lab: click-to-run checks + mouse result selection + shortcut macros","description":"Background
- DeterminismLab is core to FrankenTUI's promise.

Goal
- Make it interactive: click to run scenarios, click to inspect mismatches, and add shortcuts for 'run suite' actions.

Mouse Interactions
- Click a scenario to run.
- Click a result row to inspect details.
- Wheel scrolls details.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `A`: run all.
- `R`: rerun selected.
- `C`: copy checksum.

Acceptance Criteria
- Lab interactions are deterministic and log enough context to debug.
- Snapshot covers a non-empty result state.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/determinism_lab.rs`","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"IndigoLake","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:06.099871680Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T17:17:39.228674015Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","determinism","mouse","shortcuts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.10","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:06.099871680Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.10","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:06.099871680Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.10","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:06.099871680Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.10","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:06.099871680Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.10","title":"Determinism Lab: click-to-run checks + mouse result selection + shortcut macros","description":"Background
- DeterminismLab is core to FrankenTUI's promise.

Goal
- Make it interactive: click to run scenarios, click to inspect mismatches, and add shortcuts for 'run suite' actions.

Mouse Interactions
- Click a scenario to run.
- Click a result row to inspect details.
- Wheel scrolls details.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `A`: run all.
- `R`: rerun selected.
- `C`: copy checksum.

Acceptance Criteria
- Lab interactions are deterministic and log enough context to debug.
- Snapshot covers a non-empty result state.

Quality gates: cargo fmt/check/clippy/test all pass.","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:47:24Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.2","title":"Performance (virtualized list): mouse selection + wheel scroll + shortcuts","description":"Background
- Performance screen is a stress/virtualization demo.

Goal
- Ensure selection and scrolling are excellent with mouse and keyboard.

Mouse Interactions
- Click selects row.
- Wheel scrolls list.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `/`: search.
- `F`: toggle filter.
- `R`: reset.

Acceptance Criteria
- Mouse move does not cause perf regression; coalescing works.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/performance.rs`","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.652738479Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.652738479Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","mouse","performance","shortcuts"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.2","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.652738479Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.2","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.652738479Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.2","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.652738479Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.2","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.652738479Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.3","title":"Action Timeline: click-to-select events + wheel scroll + filter shortcuts","description":"Background
- ActionTimeline is an event stream viewer.

Goal
- Add mouse selection, wheel scrolling, and shortcuts for filtering and jumping.

Mouse Interactions
- Click event row selects and shows details.
- Wheel scrolls list.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `J/K`: next/prev event.
- `F`: filter.
- `G`: jump to latest.

Acceptance Criteria
- Selection is deterministic; no flicker when events append.

Key References
- `crates/ftui-demo-showcase/src/screens/action_timeline.rs`","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.949610455Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.949610455Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo-showcase","mouse","shortcuts","timeline"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.3","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.949610455Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.3","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.949610455Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.3","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.949610455Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.3","depends_on_id":"bd-iuvb.17.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T01:52:03.949610455Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-iuvb.17.13.4","title":"Virtualized Search: mouse row selection + wheel scroll + search shortcuts","description":"Background
- VirtualizedSearch combines list virtualization with fuzzy search.

Goal
- Mouse selection + wheel scroll should be perfect; add shortcuts for search modes.

Mouse Interactions
- Click selects row.
- Wheel scrolls.

Keyboard Shortcuts (examples)
- `/`: focus search.
- `Enter`: open selected.

Acceptance Criteria
- Behavior consistent with other list screens.
